questions.question: Gradient variance in barren plateaus scales as:
questions.explanation: Gradient variance vanishes exponentially with qubit count.

questions.question: Which helps avoid barren plateaus?
questions.explanation: Local costs measuring fewer qubits can avoid barren plateaus.

questions.question: Identity initialization helps with trainability.
questions.explanation: Starting near identity keeps gradients informative initially.

questions.question: Layerwise training adds layers:

options.text: One at a time, training each

questions.explanation: Layerwise training incrementally adds and trains layers.
